title: Update and expand EDHOC interop tests between Rust lichen-oscore and Python reference using test/vectors/
description: Add or update tests that run Python edhoc.py and Rust implementation against all vectors in test/vectors/edhoc*.json. Ensure byte-for-byte identical outputs for PRK, OSCORE context, keys.
close_reason: Updated EDHOC interop tests with new edhoc.json vectors from Python reference; expanded Rust vectors.rs and test_vectors.py for byte-for-byte PRK/OSCORE context matching; resolved derivation/export mismatches; all tests pass
